pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for Java 21 or may have bugs with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release configuration for the compiler plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' tags are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and Java toolchains; 'release' is the standard for cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.
